overrides.7-Blocks/Kepler#47: Built a custom 404 Not Found page matching Kepler's dashboard design system, featuring an animated orbital debris SVG scene and a catch-all route for previously unmatched paths.
overrides.Termix-SSH/Termix#1046: Added an "Open File Manager" option to the terminal tab's right-click context menu, wiring TabBar and AppShell to open a file browser directly from a terminal session.
overrides.Termix-SSH/Termix#1061: Fixed poor-contrast autocomplete suggestion text in the command autocomplete dropdown so it stays legible across all themes and accent colors.
overrides.nbkdoesntknowcoding/mnema#88: Replaced the plain "No sessions found" text with a styled empty-state card (icon, heading, description, and a "Clear filters" CTA) matching the app's empty-state convention.
overrides.nbkdoesntknowcoding/mnema#80: Added icon-based empty states with clearer, tab-specific copy to the Access Requests inbox for both incoming and outgoing requests.
overrides.nbkdoesntknowcoding/mnema#79: Added relative timestamps with hover-for-absolute-time display for improved readability.
overrides.ghshhf/llama.cpp-fork#11: Wrote a beginner-friendly getting-started guide covering installation, downloading models, and running first inference with llama-cli and llama-server.
overrides.Devlaner/loomy#40: Identified and fixed an IDOR vulnerability where any authenticated user could retrieve another user's email and verification status by guessing their UUID — gated the endpoint behind workspace membership and added a reduced public response shape.
overrides.IN3PIRE/db#18: Updated CHANGELOG.md to reflect recent project changes.
overrides.Princeag1310/CureCart#38: Enhanced the About Us page and rewrote it in a more professional voice.
overrides.Princeag1310/CureCart#36: Designed and added a professional README banner to improve the repository's presentation.
overrides.kakunin-ai/kakunin-mcp#13: Created and added a comprehensive ROADMAP.md outlining the project's future direction and development milestones.
